title: Sienar (disambiguation)
content:
There have been several uses of the name '''Sienar.'''

==Canon==

===People===

*'''[[Gracalia Vatara Sienar]]''', a [[New Republic pilot|pilot]] in the [[New Republic]]'s [[Vanguard Squadron]].
*'''[[Raith Sienar]]''', the CEO of Sienar Fleet Systems who designed the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter|TIE fighter]].
*The '''[[Sienar family]]''', a shipbuilding noble family.

===Companies===

*'''[[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]]''', a shipbuilding corporation that built ships for the [[Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars]].
**'''[[Sienar Design Systems]]''', a subsidiary of Republic Sienar Systems and later Sienar Fleet Systems that built the [[IPV-2C Stealth Corvette]]
*'''[[Sienar Fleet Systems]]''', the successor to Republic Sienar Systems that built ships for the [[Galactic Empire]].
**'''[[Sienar Advanced Projects Laboratory/Legends|Sienar Advanced Projects Laboratory]]''', a facility of Sienar Fleet Systems that built the [[Advanced Project ship]].
*'''[[Sienar-Jaemus Army Systems]]''', one of the successors of Sienar Fleet Systems formed in order to bypass the [[Galactic Concordance]] and supply the [[First Order]] with weapons.
*'''[[Sienar-Jaemus Fleet Systems]]''', another of the successors of Sienar Fleet Systems formed in order to bypass the Galactic Concordance and arm the First Order.

===Locations===
*'''[[Sienar TF73]]''', a planet located in the [[Outer Rim Territories]].
**'''[[Sienar Test Facility 73]]''', located on Sienar TF73
*The '''[[Sienar Fleet Systems factory]]''' on [[Absanz]]

===Other===
*The '''[[Sienar Fleet Systems mural]]''' on [[Lothal]]
*The '''[[Sienar-Chall Utilipede Transport]]'''

==Legends==

===People===
[[File:Santhe-Sienar.svg|thumb|The logo of the Sienar family of companies.]]
*'''[[Narro Sienar]]''', CEO of Santhe/Sienar Technologies and father of Raith Sienar.
*'''[[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]]''', a starship designer who helped conceptualize the [[TIE/LN starfighter|TIE fighter]] and the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].
*The '''[[Sienar family/Legends|Sienar family]]''', an affluent shipbuilding family toward the end of the Republic and through the era of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

===Companies===
*'''[[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]]''', a historic shipbuilding corporation that built ships for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]], the [[Mandalorian Wars]], and the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*'''[[Santhe/Sienar Fleet Technologies]]''', the shipbuilding arm of Santhe/Sienar Technologies.
*'''[[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]]''', a large umbrella corporation that owned a number of smaller military manufacturers.
*'''[[Sienar Advanced Projects Laboratory/Legends|Sienar Advanced Projects Laboratory]]''', a design firm that built the [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced x1]].
*'''[[Sienar Advanced Research Division]]''', a TIE testing installation near [[Curamelle/Legends|Curamelle]], the capital of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]].
*'''[[Sienar Advanced Systems]]''', developed a new engine prior to the Clone Wars.
*'''[[Sienar Army Systems]]''', a military manufacturer for the reborn [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]].
*'''[[Sienar Design Systems/Legends|Sienar Design Systems]]''', Republic Sienar Systems subsidiary that created the [[Scimitar/Legends|Sith Infiltrator]].
*'''[[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]]''', a manufacturer most famous for producing the [[TIE Series|TIE series]].
*'''[[Sienar Intelligence Systems/Legends|Sienar Intelligence Systems]]''', a manufacturer of [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]].
*'''[[Sienar Ships]]''', a civilian subsidiary of Sienar Fleet Systems.
*'''[[Sienar Technologies]]''', the predecessor to Santh/Sienar Technologies

====Products====
*The '''[[Unidentified Koros system battleship|Sienar Battleship]]''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] cruiser that served in the Great Hyperspace War.
*'''[[Sienar Sentinel]]''' starships
*'''[[Sienar Mobile Command Post]]'''
*'''[[Sienar Systems augmentor]]'''
*'''[[Starpath]]'''
*'''[[Intruder missile]]'''
